source_pr.title: stats: refine the pseudo condition for stats
source_pr.body:
This PR will use the average error rate of the row count estimated by stats to determine whether a column is pseudo. And when a column is not pseudo while the table is pseudo, we can use the stat of this column. The error rate information will be cleared when we analyzing the table.
PTAL @lamxTyler @coocood

fix_pattern: stats: refine the pseudo condition for stats

evidence: files: domain/domain.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/analyze.go, metrics/stats.go, plan/cbo_test.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, session/bootstrap.go, session/session.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, statistics/boostrap.go, statistics/dump.go, statistics/feedback.go, statistics/handle.go, statistics/histogram.go, statistics/table.go, statistics/update.go, statistics/update_test.go, tidb-server/main.go
